seoTitle: How to Pay Independent Contractors in QuickBooks Online
metaDescription: Set up and pay independent contractors in QuickBooks Online to keep payments accurate, on time, and properly tracked for tax purposes.
intro: Businesses that work with freelancers or contract workers need a reliable way to manage those payments and keep good relationships intact. This guide covers setting up and paying independent contractors in QuickBooks Online, useful for small business owners just getting started as well as those refining an existing process.

steps.heading: Set up the contractor's profile
steps.body: Add the independent contractor to QuickBooks Online with their relevant information for payment and tax tracking.

steps.heading: Choose a payment method
steps.body: Decide how you'll pay the contractor, whether through direct deposit, check, or another supported payment option.

steps.heading: Enter and process the payment
steps.body: Record the payment amount and details, then process it through your chosen method within QuickBooks Online.

steps.heading: Track payments for tax reporting
steps.body: Keep accurate records of contractor payments throughout the year, since this affects year-end tax forms like 1099s.

steps.heading: Automate recurring payments
steps.body: If you pay a contractor regularly, set up recurring payments to reduce manual entry and keep payments consistent.

faq.question: Do I need to set up a contractor differently than an employee in QuickBooks Online?
faq.answer: Yes, contractors are tracked separately from employees since they're not on payroll, and their payments feed into different tax reporting.

faq.question: Can I pay contractors through direct deposit in QuickBooks Online?
faq.answer: Yes, depending on your plan, QuickBooks Online supports direct deposit as one of the payment options for contractors.

faq.question: How does QuickBooks help with 1099 forms?
faq.answer: By tracking contractor payments throughout the year, QuickBooks Online can help you generate the necessary 1099 information at tax time.

faq.question: Can I automate contractor payments?
faq.answer: Yes, recurring payment features can automate regular contractor payments, saving time on manual entry each pay period.
